warm_up:
Activation & Mobilisation Drills:
1 round
Warm Up
10 Scap Push Ups
10 scap Pull ups
10 x Inch Worms
10 I-Y-T-W
Wrist Mobilisation

metcon.name: Workout
metcon.description:
AMRAP x 10
10/8 cal AB
3 Bar Muscle Ups/ Banded BMU/Jumping BMU
6m Handstand Walk

gymnastics:
Bar muscle up
EMOM X 4
Beat Swing x 10
- think Knuckles over the bar
Bigger Beat swing - Push down to rise up!!
Floor Arch Turn Over
Low bar transition from box
- False grip + Long arms. - move box away to make it harder
Banded BMU OR BMU
HSW Progression
EMOM X 3 20s handstand hold
EMOM X 3 180 deg. Conan Walk (on box) x 2
EMOM X 3 5-10 Shoulder taps (or wall walk)
EMOM X 5 Tripod Handstand Hold
EMOM X 5 Spotted Freestanding Handstand Hold
EMOM X 5 Spotted handstand walk with PVC

hypertrophy.reasoning: Today prioritises shoulders, triceps, core via gymnastics; accessory work targets pulling strength and lower body balance.

siri_text: Thursday's workout. Gymnastics: Bar muscle up. Metcon: AMRAP: 10/8 cal AB, 3 Bar Muscle Ups/ Banded BMU/Jumping BMU, 6m Handstand Walk. For hypertrophy, focus on back (lats/mid-back), biceps, legs (quads/glutes).
